spec_match.rationale: The page still parses HTML snippets and traverses ProcessingInstruction nodes with target/data details.

interactive.rationale: The UI now separates preset loading from the parse command, but chrome-devtools-mcp verification of the click flow is still pending.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The explorer still matches the parent blurb: edit markup, parse it, and inspect PI node details.

edge_cases.rationale: Dynamic tree and detail rendering continue to escape PI targets, data, comments, and text before writing HTML.

references.rationale: The page includes the required ChromeStatus reference link.

design_system.rationale: The new control cards use shared CSS variables, explicit foreground/background colors, and a responsive grid.

openQuestions.title: Verify separated preset and parse controls
openQuestions.detail: Use chrome-devtools-mcp to load each preset, confirm the DOM output does not update until Parse current HTML is pressed, then click PI nodes and inspect the detail table.

summary: Separated preset loading from the parse/explore command so examples populate the editor first and parsing is an explicit second action.
